content:
1. Converts temps between C/F/K (via Celsius intermediate) with Kelvin absolute-zero guard; used by weather service.
2. Incomplete absolute-zero logic (only checks Kelvin output; allows invalid negative inputs/results in C/F); round(2) after possible FP error.
3. Whether to validate NaN/Inf inputs.
4. Negative-Kelvin inputs, below-zero conversions to C/F, non-finite values, added enum members.
